title: HOST CHECK
description: 🧪 HostCheck helps you test and verify the actual performance of any Minecraft hosting server with real system stats and a benchmark score.
body:
# 🖥️ HostCheck

> 🧪 HostCheck helps you test and verify the actual performance of any Minecraft hosting server with real system stats and a benchmark score.

**Author:** JODVISHAL  
**Command:** `/hostcheck`  
**Discord:** isthisvishal  
**Works with:** All Minecraft server types (Spigot, Paper, etc.)

---

## 🔍 Description

There are many hosting providers nowadays, and most of them promise good performance.  
**Don't just trust their words — ask for a test server and use `/hostcheck` to verify the actual performance.**  
This plugin helps you check real-time system stats including CPU model, RAM, disk type and speeds, and gives you a performance score based on actual benchmarks.

---

## 📦 Installation

1. Download the plugin: `HostCheck-1.0.jar`  
2. Place it in your server's `/plugins` folder  
3. Restart your server  
4. Use the `/hostcheck` command in-game or from console

---

## 💬 Command


/hostcheck



**Description:** Displays a detailed host performance report.  
**Permission (if implemented):** `hostcheck.use` *(default: OP)*

---

## 📋 Sample Output (Console View)



\--- HostCheck Report ---
CPU: AMD EPYC 7763 64-Core Processor
Cores Used: 4
RAM Usage: 581 MB / 15152 MB
Swap Usage: 0 kB / 4194300 kB
Storage Type: HDD
Disk Speeds: Write: 1234 MB/s, Read: 8333 MB/s
Performance Score: Score: 2342



---

## 📈 Performance Score Chart

| Score Range | Performance Level | Recommended Use             |
|-------------|-------------------|-----------------------------|
| 0 - 1000    | 🟥 Poor            | Not suitable for hosting    |
| 1001 - 2000 | 🟧 Average         | Basic small servers         |
| 2001 - 3000 | 🟨 Good            | Medium-sized servers        |
| 3001 - 4000 | 🟩 Very Good       | High-performance hosting    |
| 4000+       | 🟦 Excellent       | Enterprise or dedicated use |

**Example:**  
**Score 2342** → 🟨 **Good**
